name: full-conformance-check
prompt: Check this TYPO3 extension for conformance to current standards

assertions.description: Scans extension file structure for required files
Reads ext_emconf.php and composer.json for metadata
Searches for prohibited patterns or missing declarations

name: file-structure-validation
prompt: Validate the file structure of this TYPO3 extension

assertions.description: Scans directory structure for required directories

name: coding-standards-check
prompt: Check the PHP coding standards of this TYPO3 extension. Are strict_types declared? Is PSR-12 followed?

assertions.description: Searches PHP files for strict_types declarations

name: prohibited-patterns-detection
prompt: Check this TYPO3 extension for prohibited patterns like direct $GLOBALS access, deprecated API usage, and GeneralUtility::makeInstance for services

assertions.description: Searches for prohibited patterns in PHP files
Recommends DI instead of prohibited patterns

name: di-architecture-review
prompt: Review the dependency injection architecture of this TYPO3 extension. Check Services.yaml, constructor injection, and PSR-14 event usage.

name: backend-module-v13-check
prompt: Check this extension's backend modules for TYPO3 v13 compliance. Are ES6 modules used? Is the Modal API correct? Is CSRF protection in place?

name: testing-infrastructure-check
prompt: Evaluate the testing setup of this TYPO3 extension. Is PHPUnit configured? Are there unit and functional tests?

assertions.description: Searches for test directories and configuration

name: ter-readiness-assessment
prompt: Is this TYPO3 extension ready for TER publishing? Check all requirements.

name: composer-json-validation
prompt: Validate the composer.json of this TYPO3 extension for correctness and completeness

name: modernize-to-v13
prompt: What do I need to change to modernize this extension for TYPO3 v13?

assertions.description: Reads extension files to assess v13 readiness

name: phpstan-baseline-audit
prompt: Audit the PHPStan baseline of this extension. How many suppressed errors are there? Is it trending toward zero?

name: tca-quality-check
prompt: Check the TCA configuration of this TYPO3 extension. Are searchFields defined? Is default_sortby set? Are there deprecated TCA patterns?

assertions.description: Checks for searchFields in TCA ctrl

name: xliff-completeness-check
prompt: Check XLIFF translation completeness. Are all LLL: references in the code matched by XLIFF trans-unit entries?

assertions.description: Searches for LLL: references across code and templates

name: bootstrap5-migration-check
prompt: Check this extension's Fluid templates for Bootstrap 4 patterns that need migrating to Bootstrap 5

assertions.description: Searches templates for Bootstrap 4 data attributes like data-toggle, data-dismiss

name: security-pattern-review
prompt: Review this TYPO3 extension for security patterns. Check for shell_exec usage, serialize/unserialize, XSS in ViewHelpers, and CSP violations.

name: scoring-report-generation
prompt: Generate a full conformance report with scoring for this TYPO3 extension

name: dual-version-compatibility
prompt: This extension needs to support both TYPO3 v12 and v13. What dual-version compatibility patterns should I use?

name: best-practices-review
prompt: Review this extension against TYPO3 best practices. Check for DDEV setup, runTests.sh, quality tools, and CI/CD configuration.

assertions.description: Searches for CI/CD and tooling configuration files

name: fix-all-findings
prompt: Fix all conformance findings in this TYPO3 extension. Start with critical issues, then warnings.

name: verification-loop
prompt: I just fixed the conformance issues. Re-run the checks and show me the score improvement.

assertions.description: Shows score delta with arrow notation

name: extension-context-detection
prompt: Analyze this extension and tell me what type it is, what TYPO3 versions it targets, and its current quality level.

assertions.description: Reads ext_emconf.php and composer.json for context

name: multi-version-dependency-check
prompt: This extension uses a dependency that has different APIs across major versions. How should I handle multi-version dependency compatibility?

assertions.description: Recommends adapter pattern for multi-version deps

name: cache-anti-pattern-detection
prompt: Check this extension for the cache has()+get() double-lookup anti-pattern

assertions.description: Searches for cache has() calls followed by get()

name: extbase-repository-query-check
prompt: Check Extbase repository queries in this extension. Are they using model property names (camelCase) or database column names (snake_case)?

assertions.description: Searches repository files for query patterns

name: php84-implicit-nullable-check
prompt: Check this extension for PHP 8.4 implicit nullable parameter deprecations. Find parameters with type hints that have =null default but no ? prefix.

assertions.description: Searches for implicit nullable parameters in PHP files

name: ext-emconf-strict-types-check
prompt: Check if ext_emconf.php incorrectly has declare(strict_types=1). TYPO3 requires ext_emconf.php must NOT have strict_types.

assertions.description: Reports on the strict_types exclusion rule

name: cgl-phpstan-conflict-resolution
prompt: PHPStan reports errors about static assertion methods in tests, but php-cs-fixer enforces self::assertEquals(). Which takes precedence?

assertions.description: References CGL as authoritative for code style

name: quick-check-grep-patterns
prompt: Give me quick grep commands to check this TYPO3 extension for the most common conformance issues

name: php85-compatibility-check
prompt: Check this TYPO3 extension for PHP 8.5 compatibility. Are there any deprecated patterns that need fixing?

assertions.description: Checks for implicit float-to-int conversions deprecated in PHP 8.5
Recommends updating PHP version range in ext_emconf.php

name: typo3-v14-readiness
prompt: Is this extension ready for TYPO3 v14? What needs to change?

assertions.description: Identifies v13-deprecated APIs that are removed in v14
